name: codex-orchestrator
description: Reusable GitHub Issues runner for Codex.

scripts.orchestrator:doctor: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js doctor --target .
scripts.orchestrator:status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js status --target .
scripts.orchestrator:status:json: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js status --target . --json
scripts.orchestrator:daemon: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js doctor --target . && node dist/src/cli.js daemon --target .
scripts.orchestrator:daemon:once: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js doctor --target . && node dist/src/cli.js daemon --target . --once
scripts.orchestrator:daemon:fast: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js doctor --target . && node dist/src/cli.js daemon --target . --interval-seconds 60
scripts.orchestrator:daemon:max3: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js doctor --target . && node dist/src/cli.js daemon --target . --max-runs 3
scripts.build: npm run clean --silent && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('node:fs').chmodSync('dist/src/cli.js',0o755)"
scripts.prepack: npm run bridge:manifest && npm run runtime-skills:validate
